statdown 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Why One HTML Engine Matters
  • Design

Custom knitr render function

Source: R/render.R
statdown_knit_render.Rd

Routes htmlwidget results through knit_print.htmlwidget() to register dependencies with depkit. For all other objects, falls back to knitr::knit_print(). This is necessary because htmlwidgets' .onLoad re-registers its own knit_print.htmlwidget in knitr's S3 method table, overriding statdown's registration.

Usage

statdown_knit_render(x, options, ...)

Arguments

x

The object to print.

options

A list of knitr chunk options for the current chunk.

...

Additional arguments passed to the print method.

Value

The printed result.

On this page
